propositions: Document the authenticated-identity model end-to-end including tiers, event attribution, authorship attestation, key rotation, Jira mapping, and opt-in enforcement.
Write ADR 0045 recording git-bug-style entity, opaque-id keying, and in-band TOFU decisions with context/decision/consequences.
Explain that the merge-gate is the control while the local write-gate is UX-only, and that replay never rejects.
Cover provider-neutral Jira mapping via opaque accountId and the Modify-Reporter permission constraint with documented degradation.
Add the new docs to the docs index so the docs-index completeness gate passes.
